name: Lenny Bruce
blurb: The First Amendment martyr who made stand-up dangerous.
bio: Lenny Bruce turned the nightclub act into free-form social commentary and an obscenity-law battleground. His arrests for indecent performances made him a First Amendment cause celebre, and he died at 40 mid-appeal, broke and exhausted by the courts.

timeline.ev: Releases The Sick Humor of Lenny Bruce
Arrested for obscenity in San Francisco
Convicted of obscenity in New York

accolades: First posthumous pardon in New York history (2003)
A founding figure of free-speech comedy

specials.t: The Sick Humor of Lenny Bruce
I Am Not a Nut, Elect Me!

bits.sp: The Sick Humor of Lenny Bruce
The Sick Humor of Lenny Bruce
